The Foundation

The 5 Core Lifts

Five safe, effective movements that anyone can learn. Each one is coached to your ability, building whole-body strength and confidence.

Squat

The foundation of functional strength. Builds leg strength, balance, and confidence — essential for staying active and independent at any age.

Deadlift

Pick things up safely and with ease. Strengthens your back, hips, and grip — the muscles you use every single day.

Bench Press

Build upper-body strength and bone density. Strengthens your chest, shoulders, and arms for everyday tasks and long-term health.

Overhead Press

Strengthen your shoulders and improve posture. This movement builds the stability and strength that keeps you moving freely.

Box Squat

A gentle starting point for the squat. Sit to a comfortable height and stand back up — building hip strength and control at your own pace.

Want to learn these lifts with expert coaching?

Book a Free Consultation
